name: NabuDesigner
tagline: The AI that designs landing pages worth shipping.
theme: midnight design observatory — deep indigo night sky, iris-violet & aurora-teal glow, warm star-gold, a wise owl mascot
styleSignature: cinematic premium night-sky observatory concept art, deep indigo and midnight-navy backgrounds (#07060f, #0c0a1c), luminous iris-violet (#7b6cff) and aurora-teal (#34e3c4) glow with warm star-gold (#f6cf72) accents, drifting nebula clouds, soft bokeh starfields and faint constellations, gentle volumetric god-rays, calm and wise nocturnal mood, fine ornate line-art filigree, layered depth, shallow depth of field, soft rim lighting, hyper-detailed, professional AAA concept-art quality, strong focal point, rich saturated color. No text, no words, no letters.
